title: Embedded blob additions for the burn-down / levers view (feature 005)
description: Additive fields on the existing EmbeddedData blob (features 001-003). Only the NEW fields are specified here; all existing fields are unchanged. Built once in aggregate.py; consumed client-side by aggregateLevers() in app.js.

chars_per_token.description: Disclosed chars<->tokens factor from Config (default 4.0). Newly embedded so the client can convert chain chars (space) to tokens (flow).

mounted_resident.description: One row per mounted tool: estimated per-turn resident (schema) token cost, used to price an unmount lever. Filter-independent; built once.

key.description: Tool key; matches dims.tools[].key and mounted_keys (mcp:server/tool | builtin:Name).

resident_tokens_est.description: Estimated per-turn resident tokens = per_tool_chars / chars_per_token, averaged over sessions where the tool is mounted.

method.description: sizing.RESIDENT_METHOD — the disclosed per-tool schema-split heuristic.

token_flow.description: Existing feature-003 section; only the NEW unit_prices child is specified here.

unit_prices.description: Per-model unit prices from the parsed prices.json. Present ONLY when a non-empty price list was loaded (same gate as token_flow.cost). Absent => no dollar figure anywhere.

additionalProperties.description: A missing token type means that type is unpriced for this model (never guessed).
